Part.Source:
//FolhaPagamento //FolhaPagamentoContabiil //FolhaPagamentoGerencial //FolhaPagamento //SaldoFecha
&Total = 1000 &Count = 0 &Percentual = 0 &ProgressIni = serverNow() do 'Atualiza'
&Count = 10 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, CtabanCod, CtaFunCod //contasFuncionario where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtaFunCod = &OriPesCod
&CtabanCod = CtabanCod do 'VerificaContaFuncionario' If &IsExiste = false new EmpCod = EmpCod CtabanCod = CtabanCod CtaFunCod = &DstPesCod EndNEw Endif
Delete
Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 15 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, AutGrpCod, PesCod //GrupoAutorizacaoPessoa Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &OriPesCod
delete Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 20 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each order EmpCod, PesCod, PesSacCod //PessoaObservacao Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesSacVenCod = &OriPesCod PesSacVenCod = &DstPesCod Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 25 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each order EmpCod, MovCod, MovItmCod //Movimento Item Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovFunCod = &OriPesCod MovFunCod = &DstPesCod Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 30 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each order EmpCod, PesCod, PesSacCod //PessoaObservacao Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesSacCod = &OriPesCod &PesCod = PesCod &PesSacCod = PesSacCod
do 'VerificaExistePessoaObservacao' If &IsExiste = false new EmpCod = EmpCod PesCod = &DstPesCod PesSacCod = PesSacCod EndNew EndIF Delete Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 35 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesFunObsCod //PessoaObsFuncinario Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesFunObsUsuCod = &OriPesCod PesFunObsUsuCod = &DstPesCod Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesFunObsCod //PessoaObsFuncinario Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &OriPesCod &PesFunObsCod = PesFunObsCod do 'VerificaExisteObsFuncionario' If &IsExiste = false new EmpCod = EmpCod PesCod = &DstPesCod PesFunObsCod = PesFunObsCod EndNew EndIF Delete Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 40 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, ComLctCod //VEndedorComissao Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &OriPesCod &ComLctCod = ComLctCod do 'VerificaExisteComLctCod' If &IsExiste = false new EmpCod = EmpCod PesCod = &DstPesCod ComLctCod = ComLctCod EndNew EndiF
Delete Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod , ComDta //VendedorComissaoObs Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &OriPesCod &ComDta = ComDta do 'VerificaExisteVendedorObs' If &IsExiste = false new EmpCod = EmpCod PesCod = &DstPesCod ComDta = ComDta EndNew EndIf Delete Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 45 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, ComDta, ComItmCod //VendedorComissaoObs Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &OriPesCod &ComDta = ComDta &ComItmCod = ComItmCod do 'VerificaExisteVendedorObsItem' If &IsExiste = false new EmpCod = EmpCod PesCod = &DstPesCod ComDta = ComDta ComItmCod = ComItmCod EndNew EndIf Delete Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod //DUPLICATA Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CreCliCod = &OriPesCod or CreVenCod = &OriPesCod
if CreCliCod = &OriPesCod CreCliCod = &DstPesCod EndIF
if CreVenCod = &OriPesCod CreVenCod = &DstPesCod EndIF
Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 50 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod //EntradaProducao Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PrdFunCod = &OriPesCod PrdFunCod = &DstPesCod Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProForCod //ProdutoFornecedor Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProForCod = &OriPesCod &ProCod = ProCod do 'VerificaExisteProdutoFornecedor' if &IsExiste = false new EmpCod = EmpCod ProCod = ProCod ProForCod = &DstPesCod EndNEw EndIF Delete EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 55 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod, FrtTraCod //FRETE Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FrtTraCod = &OriPesCod
FrtTraCod = &DstPesCod EndFor Commit //------------
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod //PEDIDO Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PedCliCod = &OriPesCod or PedVenCod = &OriPesCod or PedTraRedCod = &OriPesCod or PedTraSaiCod = &OriPesCod or PedCnhTraCod = &OriPesCod if PedCliCod = &OriPesCod PedCliCod = &DstPesCod EndIF
If PedVenCod = &OriPesCod PedVenCod = &DstPesCod EndIF
if PedTraRedCod = &OriPesCod PedTraRedCod = &DstPesCod EndIF
If PedTraSaiCod = &OriPesCod PedTraSaiCod = &DstPesCod EndIF
if PedCnhTraCod = &OriPesCod PedCnhTraCod = &DstPesCod EndiF
Commit //------------ EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 60 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedCriCod //PedidoCritica Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PedCriFunCod = &OriPesCod PedCriFunCod = &DstPesCod EndFor Commit //------------
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedComEspVenCod //PedidoComissao Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PedComEspVenCod = &OriPesCod
&FiLCod = FilCod &PedCod = PedCod do 'VerificaExistePedComEspVenCod' if &IsExiste = false New EmpCod = EmpCod FilCod = FilCod PedCod = PedCod PedComEspVenCod = &DstPesCod EndNew EndIF
Delete Commit //---------- EndFor Commit //------------
&Count = 65 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod //Pessoa Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesIntVenCod = &OriPesCod or PesExtVenCod = &OriPesCod or PesCliTraCod = &OriPesCod or PesVinCod = &OriPesCod or PesCliTraSaiCod = &OriPesCod
If PesIntVenCod = &OriPesCod PesIntVenCod = &DstPesCod EndIf If PesExtVenCod = &OriPesCod PesExtVenCod = &DstPesCod EndIF If PesCliTraCod = &OriPesCod PesCliTraCod = &DstPesCod EndIF If PesCliTraSaiCod = &OriPesCod PesCliTraSaiCod = &DstPesCod EndIF If PesVinCod = &OriPesCod PesVinCod = &DstPesCod EndIF Commit //---------- EndFOr Commit //----------
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod //Pessoa Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &OriPesCod
&PesIsCli = PesIsCli &PesIsFor = PesIsFor &PesIsFun = PesIsFun &PesIsTra = PesIsTra &PesIsVen = PesIsVen
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesEmlCod //PessoaEmail Delete EndFOr
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, FavRotAutCod//PessoaFavoritos Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesHerCod //PessoaFilho Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesFonCod //PessoaFone delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesRecCod//PessoaRecrutamento Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesSocCod //PessoaSocios Delete EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesRefCod //Referencias Delete EndFor
Delete Commit //---------- EndFor Commit //----------
&Count = 65 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &DstPesCod
if &PesIsCli = true PesIsCli = true EndIF
If &PesIsFor = true PesIsFor = true EndIF
If &PesIsFun = true PesIsFun = &PesIsFun EndIF
if &PesIsTra = true PesIsTra = &PesIsTra EndIf
if &PesIsVen = true PesIsVen = &PesIsVen EndIF
Commit //---------- EndFor Commit //----------
&Percentual = 100 &ProgressFin = serverNow() &ProgressLogXml = 'Processo Concluido com Sucesso!' do 'Atualiza'
Sub 'VerificaContaFuncionario' &IsExiste = false For Each Order EmpCod, CtabanCod, CtaFunCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtabanCod = &CtabanCod Where CtaFunCod = &DstPesCod &IsExiste = true Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'VerificaExistePedComEspVenCod' &IsExiste = false For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedComEspVenCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod Where PedComEspVenCod = &DstPesCod &IsExiste = true Exit EndFor EndSUb
sub 'VerificaExisteProdutoFornecedor' &IsExiste = false For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProForCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProForCod = &DstPesCod &IsExiste = true Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'VerificaExistePessoaObservacao' &IsExiste = false For Each order EmpCod, PesCod, PesSacCod //PessoaObservacao Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &DstPesCod Where PesSacCod = &PesSacCod &IsExiste = true Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'VerificaExisteComLctCod' &IsExiste = false For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, ComLctCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &DstPesCod Where ComLctCod = &ComLctCod &IsExiste = true Exit EndFOr EndSub
Sub 'VerificaExisteObsFuncionario' &IsExiste = false For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesFunObsCod //PessoaObsFuncinario Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &DstPesCod Where PesFunObsCod = &PesFunObsCod &IsExiste = true Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'VerificaExisteVendedorObs' &IsExiste = false For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, ComDta //VendedorComissaoObs Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &DstPesCod Where ComDta = &ComDta &IsExiste = true Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'VerificaExisteVendedorObsItem' &IsExiste = false For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, ComDta, ComItmCod //VendedorComissaoObs Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &DstPesCod Where ComDta = &ComDta Where ComItmCod = &ComItmCod &IsExiste = true Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini ProgressLogXml = &ProgressLogXml When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &ProgressLogXml ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
